description_long: This futuristic airplane features a sleek, angular design with a dark metallic body accented by orange highlights and a prominent blue-tinted cockpit canopy. The wings are broad and sharply swept, extending outward from the main fuselage and incorporating integrated engine nacelles at the rear. Twin vertical stabilizers are mounted at the ends of the tail, giving the aircraft a distinctive H-tail configuration. The surface is mostly matte with some glossy elements, suggesting advanced composite materials. The cockpit is centrally located and fully enclosed, with a single canopy window dominating the forward section. The overall appearance is aggressive and modern, suitable for high-speed urban or sci-fi environments.
description: A sleek, dark metallic airplane with swept wings, orange accents, and a blue-tinted central cockpit. Twin vertical stabilizers and integrated rear engines give it a futuristic, aggressive look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, blue cockpit canopy, and wide, angular wings with orange highlights.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the sharply swept wings, rear-mounted engines, and the angular, layered body structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the twin vertical stabilizers, engine exhausts, and the broad, flat tail section.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights the symmetry of the wing and tail design, as well as the cockpit's central placement.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with sharply swept wings and integrated engine nacelles; no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted at the rear of the fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: H-tail configuration with twin vertical stabilizers at the ends of the tailplane.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear, with main gear under the wings and a nose gear under the cockpit.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, fully enclosed single-seat cockpit with a large blue-tinted canopy.
